titleStmt.title: SII 16.224: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 224. (A.R. No. 485 of 1906.) GAṆḌIKŌṬA, JAMMALAMADUGU TALUK, CUDDAPAH DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the south wall of the prākāra of the ruined temple of Raṅganāyaka.
The inscription is dated Śaka 1479, Piṅgaḷa, Pushya śu. 8, Sunday, corresponding to 1557 A.D., December 29. The week day, however, was Wednesday.

It records a grant of land at Pedakomerla in Ghaṇḍikōṭa-sīma in Udayagiri-rājya for conducting the various festivals such as the floating festival, the swing festival etc., and for offerings to god Raghunāyaka of Ghaṇḍikōṭa by Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara China Avubhaḷēśvaradēva-mahārāju, son of Avubhaḷēśvaradēva-mahārāju and grandson of Avubhaḷrājayyadēva-mahārāju of Nandyāla.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . śrīrāmacaṁdrāya namaḥ . svasti śrī jayābhyudaya śālivāhana śakava¨rṣaṁbulu 1479 Agunēṭi piṁgaḷa saṁvatsara puṣya śu 8 Ā
śrīmadrājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīra sadāśivadēvamahārāyalu vidyānagaramaṁdu vajrasiṁhvāsanārūḍhulayi pṛdhvīsāmrājyaṁ śēyucuṁḍagānu Akhilāṁḍakōṭibrahmāṁḍa nāyaku
laina dēvadēvōttama dēvaśikhāmaṇiyaina gaṁḍikōṭa śrīraghunāyakula dipyacaraṇāraviṁdaṁ bulku svāmi dāsānadāsuḍu Ātrēyagōtraṁ Āpastaṁbhasūtraṁ yajuśśākhādhyāyu layina sōmavaṁśōdbhavulayina
śrīmanmahāmaṁḍalēśvara naṁdyāla Avubhaḷrājayadēvamahārājuluṁgāri pautṛlayina Avubhaḷēśvaradēvamahārājulaṁgāri putṛlu cinaAvubhaḷēśvaradēvamahārājulaṁgāru Anaṁtamula
yina daṁḍamulu sama[¨rppiṁ]ci yiccina bhūdānadharmaśāsanamu svāmi sadāśivadēvamahā rāyalu mānāyaṁkarānaku pāliṁcanavadhariṁcina vudayagirirājyānaku lōnayina gha
ṁḍikōṭasīmalōnu pinākinadiki vuttarabhāgāna pedakome¨rlagrāmānanu dadhyōdanānaku nela 1 ki va ga saṁvatsarāniki va 12Ø nu Akhaṁḍatiruvaḷikeku pariki nanuca
tō deccēvāri teppatiruṇāḷa mahōtsavālku vaga ni makarasaṁkrāṁtimahōtsavānu, cervu pāruveṁṭa kunu vaga 3 nu tōputiruṇāḷaku di 1 ki vaga
ki vaga 3 Ö 15 cātupaḍi Ö 15 vubhayaṁ vaga 30 kōṭatiruṇāḷa mahōtsavānku vūṁjalitiruṇāḷa di 5 ki 2 . vijayadaśamicerapu mahōtsavānku
tēru tiruṇāḷamahōtsavānku di va ga 4 dinālu 10 ṭiki 40 nni pallaki sēvaku di 1 kini paṁṇyārānaku paḍi veccamu svāmi
vūḷigalavāri di 1 ki lekhanu yēṁḍokaṁṭiki�vaga viśēṣa cāṁtupaḍiki 15 vubhayamuṁnu vaga 30 Aṁtu veccamu nu
yī tathātidhi makarasaṁkrāṁtipuṇyakālaṁ pinākinīnadītīramaṁdu sahiraṇyōdakadāna dhārāpū¨rvakamugānu dhāravōśi Icci
na yīkaiṁkaryamunaku pedakome¨rla grāmānanu sthaḷamunu dāsarivāricēnistaḷaṁ vagarokha
Akṣarālānu puṭlunu paṁdumunnu trivācikamugānu trikaraṇaśudhigānu sadyaḥparicchēdamugānu sama¨rpiṁci yistimi
nidhinikṣēpajalapāṣāṇaAkṣīṇiĀgāmi Aniyeḍi Aṣṭabhōgatējasvāṁmyatalunu Ācaṁdrā¨rka sdhāyigānu bhūdāna dha¨rmma
śāsanamu . dānapālanayō¨rmadhyē dānācchrēyōnupālanaṁ . dānātsva¨rgamavāpnōti pālanādacyutaṁ padaṁ . śrīśrīśrī .
Digital edition of SII 16.224 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
